Withdraw

Unstake your STX tokens and return to your wallet

Connect to Withdraw

Connect your Stacks wallet to withdraw your staked STX

Withdrawal Process

1

Request Withdrawal

Instant

Enter the amount of STX you want to unstake

2

Cooldown Period

~24 hours

Wait for the 144-block security cooldown

3

Complete Withdrawal

Instant

Finalize to receive your STX tokens

Important Notice

Withdrawing will affect your tier status. You will stop earning rewards on withdrawn amounts immediately.

A
Aegis Vault

Secure, non-custodial STX staking protocol on the Stacks blockchain. Earn competitive rewards with flexible lockup periods.
